channel.title: Force on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Force on Gajab Jobs

item.title: CRPF Constable Tradesman Online Form 2026
item.description: CRPF Constable (Technical & Tradesmen & Pioneer) Recruitment 2026 notification has been issued for 9,195 vacancies. Out of these, 9,175 posts are for Technical & Tradesmen (Male: 9,096, Female: 79) and 20 posts are for Pioneer Wing (Mason and Electrician). Candidates with 10th pass qualification and required trade skills are eligible to apply online from 20/04/2026 to 19/05/2026. The recruitment process includes PET, PST, CBT, Trade Test, document verification, and medical examination. Candidates should read the official notification for complete details before applying.

item.title: Indian Navy Agniveer MR Musician 02/2026 Batch Online Form
item.description: Indian Navy invites online applications for Agniveer MR (Musician) 02/2026 batch. Unmarried male and female candidates who have passed 10th with at least 50% marks and possess musical skills are eligible to apply. The application process will be open from 11 April to 26 April 2026. Selection will be based on shortlisting, physical fitness test, written examination, music ability test and medical test. Selected candidates will serve for 4 years under the Agniveer scheme.

item.title: ITBP Constable Barber & Washerman Online Form 2026
item.description: Secretariat Security Force (SSF) ne Constable (Barber & Washerman) ke 10 padon par bharti nikali hai. 10th pass purush abhyarthi 30 March 2026 se 28 April 2026 tak online aavedan kar sakte hain. Bharti prakriya me Physical Test, Written Exam, Trade Test, Document Verification aur Medical shamil hai. Vetan Level-2 ke tahat ₹19,900 se ₹63,200 tak diya jayega.
